text:
Created attachment 248454
fix pkg-plist

portmaster fails with:

[....]
===>   Registering installation for unbound-1.19.1
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/dns/unbound/work/stage/usr/local/lib/libunbound.so.8.1.23:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1
[....]

update also pkp-plist
